message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Client A" as A
participant "Server" as S
participant "Client B" as B

note over A #LightYellow: p1 (0, 0)
note over S #LightYellow: p1 (0, 0)
note over B #LightYellow: p1 (0, 0)

A -> S : input: move-forward (id: 1)

note over A #LightYellow: Begin movement animation

note over A #LightYellow: Finish movement animation
note over S #LightYellow: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note over A #LightBlue: p1 (0, 1)
note over S #LightBlue: p1 (0, 1)

A -> S : input: move-forward (id: 2)

note over A #LightYellow: Begin movement animation

S --> A : update: game-state (ack id: 1)
S -> B : update: game-state

note over A #LightYellow: Finish movement animation
note over S #LightYellow: Update Game Model\nSimulate move-forward

note over A #LightBlue: p1 (0, 2)
note over S #LightBlue: p1 (0, 2)

S --> A : update: game-state (ack id: 2)
S -> B : update: game-state

note over B #LightYellow: Begin movement animation

note over B #LightYellow: Finish movement animation

note over B #LightBlue: p1 (0, 1)

@enduml
```
